description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The structure is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and a small lawn area, and is bordered by paved walkways and a driveway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the walls, allowing for ample natural light and views of the exterior. The property features a swimming pool adjacent to the main building, separated by a paved patio area. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sections featuring glass and metallic accents. The overall design emphasizes open space, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped greenery, and an adjacent swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, patio, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and the pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
